name: Create and verify a new private sequential playlist
fullName: Test Sequential Playlist: Create and verify a new private sequential playlist

steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user navigates to "playlist" section of create
When user "creates" "public" playlist with title "Sequential Playlist" description "Test Sequential Playlist"
Then user performs operations on playlist "Sequential Playlist"
